case_title: YANA REYKHEL VS. HEALTH LINK, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-07-2014 CONTINUED TO JUL-09-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR DEFENDANT(S) TO OBTAIN ORDER TO STAY/ DISMISS/ ABATE/ CONSOLIDATE WITH RELATED CASE OR FOR TRIAL SETTING. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GERTSIKOV, DANIEL INDIVIDUAL  AND DIRECTOR  OF THE CORPORATION JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 55623229)

PARTNERSHIP AND CORPORATE GOVERNANCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYKHEL, YANA AN INDIVIDUAL AND DIRECTOR OF THE CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT HEALTH LINK, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION GERTSIKOV, DANIEL INDIVIDUAL  AND DIRECTOR  OF THE CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-07-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-03-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-14-2014
